title: Oil steadies amid opportunistic buying
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Heavy selling seen in commodity markets over the past few days eased as traders took stock of market fundamentals. Image reference: 1678993021055.png | assets/2023-03-17_oil-steadies-amid-opportunistic-buying_img_1678993021055_856a69343b07.png
Crude oil found some support late in the session following a three-day selloff as technical selling eased. However, risks remain to the downside amid the worsening banking crisis.
